zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maxwell 4th of Pollok於1337年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾波洛可時，他的父親John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok39歲，母親Christian Erskine22歲。他於大約0001年與Elizabeth de Saint Michel結婚。他去世於1405年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Maxwell 4th of Pollok于1337年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾波洛可时，他的父亲John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok39岁，母亲Christian Erskine22岁。他于大约0001年与Elizabeth de Saint Michel结婚。他去世于1405年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Maxwell 4th of Pollok was born in 1337, in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok, was 39 and his mother, Christian Erskine, was 22. He married Elizabeth de Saint Michel about 0001. He died in 1405, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maxwell 4th of Pollok est né en 1337, à Pollok, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Christian Erskine, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Saint Michel environ 0001. Il est décédé en 1405, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maxwell 4th of Pollok 1337 in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok 39 und seine Mutter Christian Erskine 22. Er hat um 0001 Elizabeth de Saint Michel geheiratet. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell 4th of Pollok è nato il nel 1337 nel Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Christian Erskine, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Saint Michel circa 0001. Morì nel 1405, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwell 4th of Pollokが1337年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアポロクで生まれた時，父John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollokは39歳，母Christian Erskineは22歳であった。約0001年にElizabeth de Saint Michelと結婚した。彼は1405年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(이)가 1337년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 폴로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Erskine(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 0001년 Elizabeth de Saint Michel(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1405년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell 4th of Pollok nasceu em 1337, em Pollok, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Christian Erskine, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Saint Michel aproximadamente 0001. Ele faleceu em 1405, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maxwell 4th of Pollok родился в 1337 г. в местности поллок, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Erskine, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Saint Michel около 0001 г. Он умер в 1405 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Maxwell 4th of Pollok nació en 1337, en Pollok, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Maxwell - Third Lord of Pollok, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Christian Erskine, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Saint Michel aproximadamente 0001. Murió en 1405, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
